meta.title: The 'Deadliest Recruit' Ever To Pass Through Parris Island & Other Top Stories From The Week
meta.description:
It's Saturday 15 August 2020. Here are this week's top stories from Sandboxx News: 

Meet the 'deadliest recruit' ever to pass through Parris Island
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/2Q09D2d

What do Air Force fighter pilots do?
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/3h4J33L

The Air Force wants the president's plane to be hypersonic
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/3iLyDGD

US Army Soldier and nurse crushes The Rock's new show,'The Titan Games'
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/2Y94fhL

3 Tips for transitioning out of the military (that you may not have heard)
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/2DRzlDI

Guest Story | https://bit.ly/uhG0RC

'The Jet Doesn't Care:' 1st female F-35 demo pilot says she's focused on excellence
Get the full story 👉 https://bit.ly/2Y4nety

*The appearance of DoD visual information does not imply or constitute DoD endorsement.

0:00 Intro
0:50 The Deadliest Recruit 
1:58 Life as a Fighter Pilot 
2:30 A Hypersonic Plane for the President
3:41 Soldier Competes in Titan Games
4:35 Tips for Transitioning Out of the Military
Subscribe and 🔔 to Sandboxx YouTube so you never miss a video. 
5:23 1st Female F-35 Demo Pilot
